videos.title: 3 Things We Got Wrong About The Steam Machine
videos.description: The Steam Machine was a long awaited console with a lot of predictions from performance to price, not all of which were true. Believe it or not, there are a few things we got wrong about the Steam Machine as well.

videos.title: Even Valve is Disappointed - Steam Machine Review
videos.description:
Pre-order your Companion Cube at https://shortlinus.com 

The Steam Machine aims to bridge the gap between PC performance and console convenience, bringing SteamOS to your living room. We’ve spent two weeks testing Valve's latest hardware to see if it delivers on the promise of 4K gaming and seamless home integration. Is the GabeCube actually worth the (not-so) budget price tag? 

Check out the Steam Machine here: https://lmg.gg/ltt516

Discuss on the forum: https://linustechtips.com/forum/17-lt

videos.description: The Steam Machine is here and we went hands on to give you our first impressions on its crazy features and how it performs.
